hero.headline: *Premium Metal Roofing* That Protects Charlotte Homes for Decades
hero.subheadline: Professional installation, transparent pricing, and lifetime warranties on all metal roof systems. Get your detailed estimate within 24 hours.

services_section.label: ROOFING SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete Metal Roofing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From new installations to emergency repairs, we handle every aspect of metal roofing with precision and expertise.

services.title: Metal Roof Installation
services.description: Complete new metal roof systems including standing seam, corrugated panels, and architectural metal. All installations backed by manufacturer and workmanship warranties.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Full roof tear-off and replacement services. We handle permits, disposal, and coordinate with insurance companies for seamless project completion.

services.title: Emergency Roof Repair
services.description: Storm damage, leak repairs, and panel replacement. 24-hour emergency response with temporary protection while permanent repairs are scheduled.

services.title: Professional Inspections
services.description: Detailed roof condition assessments with photo documentation and repair recommendations. Perfect for home purchases, insurance claims, and maintenance planning.

about.heading: Charlotte's Trusted Metal Roofing Contractors
about.body: Metal Roof Experts has protected Charlotte area homes with premium metal roofing systems since 2015. Our certified installers specialize in standing seam, corrugated, and architectural metal roofing, delivering superior craftsmanship and transparent pricing on every project.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: Had our standing seam metal roof installed last month. The crew finished in 3 days despite rain delays, and the cleanup was spotless. Love the sound dampening they added.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Called Friday evening about storm damage, they had tarps up by Saturday morning and permanent repairs done within the week. Insurance covered everything smoothly.

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: Estimate was detailed and fair - no surprises. The metal roof looks amazing and we're already seeing lower energy bills after just 2 months.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREAS
service_areas.heading: Serving Charlotte & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional metal roofing services throughout the greater Charlotte metro area.

cta.heading: Ready for a Superior Metal Roof?
cta.body: Get your detailed estimate with material options, timeline, and transparent pricing. Most estimates delivered within 24 hours.
